feat.name: Advanced Concoction
feat.special: You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another alchemist feat.
feat.text: You gain one alchemist feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your alchemist level is equal to half your character level.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
